programme.desc: Saquon Barkley dashed through the snow for two touchdown runs and finished with 205 yards rushing, Jalen Hurts had a 44-yard scoring run and the Eagles held on against the turnover-happy Rams 28-22 on Sunday to reach the NFC championship game.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris Como visits 20-year-old PGA Tour winner Matthew Wolff and long-time coach George Gankas in southern California. Gankas shares why Wolff's unorthodox backswing is effective and teaches how to create speed by focusing on rotation.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Instructor Chris Como is on a journey to explore golf's leading teachers and influencers who are shaping the game for future generations. Como travels the world in search of the culture, philosophy, and technology of successful players and coaches.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Putting great Brad Faxon discusses his thought process and mechanics on the green. From Old Palm Golf Club in Palm Beach Gardens, Fla.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: David Leadbetter demonstrates the drills and techniques he taught Nick Faldo before he won six major championships. Leadbetter also reveals how to perfectly grip the club and the technology he trusts when teaching his students.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Legendary instructor Bill Harmon discusses the fundamentals his father Claude, 1948 Masters Champion, engrained into the Harmon family.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy gives advice on long game.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy gives tips to overcome the most unusual situations.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Answering questions submitted by members.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: From challenging lies to putting errant shots back on track and more, Rory offers up his approach to handling the kinds of shots and strategy that can improve scores and impress golf buddies.

programme.title: Lessons With a Champion Golfer
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy and his lifetime instructor, Michael Bannon, share drills and tips used throughout McIlroy's career.

programme.title: Lessons With a Champion Golfer
programme.desc: Members learn directly from Rory McIlroy and his lifetime instructor, Michael Bannon, as they share drills and tips used throughout McIlroy's career.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy answers questions from GolfPass members about how to hit shots around trees, techniques for downhill bunker lies and the keys to hitting flighted wedge shots.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Chris Como to answer questions covering how to get more distance, the keys to hitting fairway woods, how to play shots from the rough and much more.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Chris Como to answer questions covering distance keys, his pre-shot routine, shot shaping and playing in windy conditions.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy gives advice on long game.

programme.title: 9 Shots With Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy covers hitting the nine key shots in golf from different positions on the course needed to shoot lower scores and impress friends.

programme.title: Rory x Operation 36
programme.desc: Lauren Thompson and Rory McIlroy are joined by Maya Gaudin, a Drive, Chip and Putt champion, to try out Level one and provide a few tips for pitch shots in the process.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal are back on the range teaching how to get off to a solid start this golf season; ball striking tips used by greats; Hall reveals how two empty sleeves of golf balls can improve ball striking.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach a variety of shots from the sand, including how to hit green-side bunker shots. Martin also shares fairway bunker tips he learned from Rory McIlroy, and Tom Watson shares his advice for dealing with plugged lies.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal show which setup, swing, and equipment adjustments translate into driving the ball longer and straighter. Martin shares driving tips from Dustin Johnson and discusses how to find the proper driver shaft length.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal share chipping tips from 10 Masters champions including Tiger Woods, Gary Player, Phil Mickelson, and Nick Faldo; how to scramble from just off the green, hit long running chips, and make crisp contact from tight lies.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The importance of the follow through with drills on improving the swing post-impact; Ben Hogan's picture frame finish stops the hook; Henrik Stenson stops the slice; how arm wrestling can improve the golf swing.

programme.title: Top Tips: Celebrating Women in Golf
programme.desc: GolfPass brings you thousands of lessons from the game's best instructors, original series, news, features and more.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: Hally is haunted by an apparition; Emilia Migliaccio's decision to join golf media rather than turn pro.
